results.title: Eviction Drive Begins in Patia-Kalarahanga, Locals Protest Against Demolition Action
results.description: ‘ #ଘର_ଭ ାଙ୍ଗିଲେ #ତ ୁମ_ଚେର_କାଟିଦବୁ...’ ପଟିଆ କଳାରାହାଙ୍ଗରେ ଉଚ୍ଛେଦ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ଆରମ୍ଭ । ସରକାରୀ ଜମିରେ ଚାଲିଛି ଉଚ୍ଛେଦ । ଉଚ୍ଛେଦ ଦେଖି ତାତିଲେ ଲୋକ । ଦାଆ, ପନିକି ଧରି ଧାଇଁଲେ । କହିଲେ ଘର ଭାଙ୍ଗିବତ ତମେ ଦେଖିବ କଣ କରିବୁ... #Bhubaneswar #EvictionDrive #BMC #EncroachmentRemoval #UrbanDevelopment #Odisha #OdishaTV #OTV An eviction drive has been launched in the Patia–Kalarahanga area of Bhubaneswar, where the administration began clearing alleged encroachments on government land. The Bhubaneswar Municipal Corporation (BMC) initiated the process after prior announcements, asking residents to vacate the area before demolition began. During the operation, strong resistance was reported from locals, with some people allegedly rushing towards the eviction team carrying sharp tools like axes and sickles, expressing anger over the demolition of houses. The situation created tension in the locality as officials continued the drive on government land. Authorities are carrying out the eviction as part of an ongoing effort to remove illegal encroachments and reclaim public land in the capital city. results.title: Farmers Besiege Collector’s Office in Bhawanipatna Over Paddy Registration
results.description: Farmers from Indravati Megalift irrigation areas staged a massive protest in Bhawanipatna on Tuesday, besieging the district collector’s office over exclusion from paddy registration. For the past 12 days, cultivators from Kokasara and Dharmagarh blocks have sat in dharna, demanding registration to sell their harvested paddy. results.title: Punjab AAP demands Local Area Development Fund for MLAs
results.description: Addressing the media at Chandigarh, AAP MLAs Aman Arora, H S Phoolka and others demanded that the state government pass the MLA Local Area Development Fund Bill 2017 in the coming Assembly session. Arora said that the MLA Local Area Development Fund has been introduced in many states which is similar to that of MPLAD Fund introduced by Government of India in year 1993.

results.title: Over 300 workers displaced after Misamis Oriental steel plant raid
results.description: At least 316 workers were displaced after the government conducted a raid and suspended the operations at Philippine Sanjia Steel Corporation in Tagoloan, Misamis Oriental, authorities said Tuesday.
